name: UVAT Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: UVAT Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the design and development of physical vapor deposition equipment and coating machines in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers sputtering equipment for use in touch panel, solar cells, LED, biotechnology, semiconductor, surface decoration coating, functional coating, and plasma treatment fields. The company also provides OEM coating services comprising appearance coatings, such as surface decorative coating, non conductive vacuum metallization/NMVM, color coating, and optical coating; and functional film coatings, including electromagnetic interference coating, anti-reflective coating, AF/AS coating, IC carrier, heat dissipating substrates, and barrier layer, as well as offers coating services for the LED industry. In addition, it provides coating services for touch screen industry consisting of indium-tin-oxide and touch module circuits; and biotechnology industry, including bio sensors, as well as offers other anti-finger print film coating services. UVAT Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
